settings.title: We Are Now Set Up for Hybrids and EVs
settings.excerpt: Two of our techs are freshly qualified on high-voltage systems, so your hybrid no longer means a trip to the dealer.
settings.body:
More of you arrive in hybrids and electrics every month, and until now we could only do the basics on them. That changes today.

Sam and Liam have completed their high-voltage qualifications, and we have invested in the insulated tools and equipment the work demands. We can now service hybrids and full EVs safely in-house.

That covers brakes, suspension, tyres, software-aware servicing, and the high-voltage checks that used to send you back to the dealer at dealer prices.

If you have been told your hybrid can only be touched by a main agent, bring it to Torque and let us quote against it.
